'''Wind riders''' were [[repulsorcraft]] manufactured and used by the [[Sevari]] on [[Sevarcos II]]. It consisted of a long hull and had two [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] units and a large sail to catch the eternal winds of Sevarcos II. It was operated by two persons. One would pilot the vessel by operating a tiller in the back end, while the other, called a [[sailor]], was in charge of the sails.

Some wind riders had means of protection against boarding, which were in fact often used to assist boarding of others as well, such as a large [[Ballista/Legends|ballista]] at the bow. Larger battleships would also use [[Catapult/Legends|catapults]], while [[slave galley]]s were armed with [[flashcannon]]s.
